title: periploca khasiana
intro: Periploca khasiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to the Himalayas, particularly in the western and eastern Himalayas. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Periploca khasiana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the roots and stems of the plant are used to make decoctions, infusions, and ointments, often in combination with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties.
